description_long: This is a large, contemporary-style sofa upholstered in distressed brown leather, giving it a rugged, urban appearance. The sofa features a single, continuous seat and backrest cushion, both of which are integrated into the frame, creating a seamless and monolithic look. The armrests are broad, thick, and at the same height as the backrest, forming a rectangular enclosure around the seating area. Two accent pillows, one black and one white with a geometric pattern, are placed on one side, adding contrast and visual interest. The sofa sits directly on the ground with no visible legs, emphasizing its solid, blocky form. The leather surface shows natural creases and wear, enhancing its vintage, lived-in character.
description: A large, blocky brown leather sofa with integrated cushions and broad, rectangular armrests, accented by two contrasting pillows. The distressed leather and seamless design give it a rugged, urban vibe.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full seat, backrest, and both armrests, with two accent pillows clearly visible on the right side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, thick armrest, and the placement of the pillows along the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous leather back and the sofa's solid, monolithic construction with no visible legs.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the sofa's broad armrests, integrated cushions, and the contrasting pillows on one end.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat and backrest cushions integrated into the frame, with two loose accent pillows on one side; cushions are uniform and attached.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, rectangular armrests at the same height as the backrest, fully padded and upholstered in matching leather, with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the sofa base sits directly on the ground, giving a block-like, grounded appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, continuous backrest integrated with the armrests, forming a single, seamless structure with no segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Distressed, solid brown leather with visible natural creases and wear; no decorative stitching or patterned detailing.
